services_supported: plumbing and gas line connections for hot tubs
emergency_definition: Calls from regular property managers and general contractors are considered emergencies
Emergency calls from other clients are evaluated case‑by‑case by Ben
integration_constraints: Requires integration with Jobber CRM (currently used for scheduling and invoicing).
after_hours_flow_summary: After‑hours calls are taken directly by Ben; there is no automated voicemail or 24/7 on‑call system.
office_hours_flow_summary: During business hours Clara answers calls, books site visits and jobs via Jobber, but appointment confirmations require Ben's approval.
questions_or_unknowns: What is the company’s physical address?
What is the company’s primary phone number in E.164 format?
What are the exact business‑hours end time and the applicable timezone?
Who should receive emergency calls as the primary contact (phone number)?
notes: Service call fee is $115 and should be mentioned only if the customer asks. Hourly charge is $98 per hour for residential work, billed in half‑hour increments. Preferred notification email is info@benselectricsolutionsteam.com. SMS notifications will use the same number as the main business line. Currently using a personal number as business line; plans to add a second number for personal use. Clara will forward calls from the main line and can transfer calls to the client. Client wants to test configuration before going live.
